chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 510 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2835/2025. 2. For orders on office objection No.14. 3. For orders on CMA No.2836/2025. 4. For orders on CMA No.2837/2025. 5. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Saad Shafiq Siddiqui, advocate for the petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2, 4 & 5. Petitioner has made some application to the respondent department and has filed this writ to seek expeditiously disposal thereto. No case is made out to invoke the discretionary writ jurisdiction of this court. In such circumstances, petition is found to be misconceived, hence dismissed in limime alongwith pending application/s. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
